title: iris lutescens var. olbiensis
intro: Iris lutescens var. olbiensis, also known as the yellow iris, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iris lutescens var. olbiensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's root and rhizome are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote healing and reduce pain.
